name: modular-sso
description: Guides teams through Modular SSO with Scalekit when the app already manages users and sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Add enterprise SSO without replacing your app stack.
interface.longDescription: Helps implement connection-based SSO, IdP-initiated login handling, and enterprise onboarding while preserving existing user and session management.
defaultPrompt: Add modular enterprise SSO with Scalekit to this app.
Implement IdP-initiated login handling with Scalekit.
Review my SSO onboarding and callback flow.
